description: Full 4-model Docker council (Gemini back via OpenRouter). 24 issues but avg score 7.6/10 — huge jump. Grok gave 8.5! Issue count up because Gemini is back (was 0 last round).

asi.hypothesis: Batch 3 fixes: EPERM bug, isPiProcess stricter, run-id 8-byte entropy, duplicate model ID rejection, silent config warning, results status-based counting, unused imports removed
asi.score_jump: avg 6.33->7.63 (+1.3), Grok 6->8.5, GPT 6->7, Gemini back at 8
asi.gemini_note: Back via OpenRouter - no more rate limits
asi.top_new_issues: fake default model names, FD close race, TOCTOU races, background spawn no real exit codes, ANSI padding
asi.docker: all 4 models ran in Docker container (--memory 4g --cpus 2)

description: Batch 4: SIGINT .once, TOCTOU fixes, ctx.ui guard, config revert to agnostic. 4-model Docker council: 18 unique issues. Scores: Claude 7.5, GPT 7, Gemini 8, Grok 8. Avg 7.6.

asi.hypothesis: Batch 4: SIGINT .once fix, TOCTOU race fixes (remove existsSync before readFileSync), ctx.ui non-interactive guard, config default reverted to provider-agnostic
asi.score_trend: Claude 7->7.5, GPT 7 stable, Gemini 8 stable, Grok 8.5->8 (slightly down)
asi.top_remaining: spawn failure no cleanup of prior children, stream parser full-file read, extension/CLI schema drift, no integration tests, extension imports ../../src
asi.false_positives: config silent fallback was fixed in source but not rebuilt for Docker run

description: Batch 5: spawn failure cleanup, killAllAgents helper, cleanup dedup. 4-model Docker council: 16 unique issues. Scores: Claude 7, GPT 7, Gemini 8.5, Grok 8.2. Avg 7.68. Gemini highest ever!

asi.hypothesis: Batch 5: spawn failure cleans up prior children, killAllAgents shared helper, cleanup.ts deduplicated
asi.consensus_remaining: stream parser full-file read (4/4), extension/CLI schema drift (3/4), no integration tests (3/4), extension logic duplication (3/4)
asi.diminishing_returns: Most remaining issues are medium/low severity design improvements, not bugs

description: Batch 6: Streaming line-by-line parser (no more full-file read). 4-model Docker council: ~14 issues. Scores: Claude 7, GPT 7, Gemini 8, Grok 8.5. Avg 7.63. Grok praised the new parser!

asi.hypothesis: Rewrite stream-parser to chunked line-by-line reading (64KB chunks) + async readline variant. No more full-file-to-memory.
asi.stream_parser_feedback: Grok praised: 'stream parser that avoids loading whole files into memory'. GPT didn't mention it at all (no longer an issue). Claude/Gemini had minor mentions.
asi.remaining_consensus: extension/CLI schema drift, no integration tests, extension logic duplication, bare catch blocks, fictional model names
asi.plateau_note: Scores stabilizing around 7.5-7.7. Remaining issues are design/architecture, not bugs.

description: Batch 7: Shared artifact writer (artifacts.ts), extension uses unified schema. 3/4 models ran (Gemini timed out). Claude 7.5, GPT 7, Grok 8. Schema drift no longer flagged by GPT/Grok.

asi.hypothesis: Shared artifacts.ts with generateResultsMd/Json/writeArtifacts used by both CLI and extension. Extension AgentResult now includes provider.
asi.schema_drift_fixed: GPT and Grok no longer mention schema drift between CLI and extension
asi.gemini_timeout: Gemini was cancelled — hit the 300s timeout while doing tool calls
asi.remaining: no integration tests, extension still duplicates orchestration logic, bare catch blocks, fictional model names

description: Batch 8: parseArgs tests (13 new), integration tests (mock pi binary + createRun), exported parseArgs. 2/4 models responded (GPT error, Gemini timeout). Claude 7, Grok 7.5. ~12 remaining issues estimated from 2 responses.

asi.hypothesis: Add parseArgs tests (13 new), integration test with mock pi binary, createRun lifecycle test. Total 55 tests.
asi.noisy_run: Only 2/4 models responded (GPT error stopReason, Gemini timeout). Issue count estimated from partial data.
asi.remaining: extension orchestration dedup, bare catch blocks, fictional model names

description: Final clean 2-model run: Claude 7.5, Grok 8.5 (highest ever). ~11 remaining issues, mostly low severity. 55 tests. 31+ fixes across 8 batches. Started at 24 issues/6.4 avg → 11 issues/8.0 avg.

asi.hypothesis: Final measurement run with reliable models (claude+grok). All fixes in place.
asi.final_state: 11 issues remaining (mostly low/info severity), 55 tests, 31+ fixes
asi.journey: 24 issues at 6.4 avg -> 11 issues at 8.0 avg across 8 batches
asi.claude_notes: Praised: 'surprisingly mature for v0.1.0, consistent error handling, well-considered edge cases'
asi.grok_notes: 8.5/10: 'Would be 9+ with small polish. Excellent engineering for the domain.'
asi.top_remaining: extension ../../src imports, fictional model names, no extension tests, config dir not overridable

description: GPT and Gemini confirmed working (needed 600s timeout + shorter prompt). GPT 7, Gemini 8. All 4 models: Claude 7.5, GPT 7, Gemini 8, Grok 8.5 → avg 7.75. Up from baseline 6.4.

asi.hypothesis: Retry GPT+Gemini with 600s timeout and shorter prompt to confirm they work
asi.result: Both succeeded. GPT stopReason=stop this time. Gemini needed ~5min for all tool calls.
asi.gemini_fix: Timeout was the issue, not the code. 300s too short for Gemini's thorough file reading.

description: Batch 9: Extension usage tracking, 600s default timeout, abort saves artifacts, child.kill safety, PI_COUNCIL_HOME env. All 4 models succeeded! Claude 8 (first time!), GPT 7, Gemini 8, Grok 8. Avg 7.75.

asi.hypothesis: Batch 9: extension usage propagation, 600s timeout, abort artifact saving, child.kill safety, PI_COUNCIL_HOME testability env var
asi.milestone: Claude gave 8/10 for the first time! All 4 models at 7+.
asi.journey: 24 issues at 6.4 avg -> ~10 issues at 7.75 avg
asi.remaining: extension orchestration dedup, fictional model names, bare catch blocks — all low severity

description: Final confirming run. All 4 models succeeded in under 3min. Claude 7.5, GPT 7, Gemini 8, Grok 8. Avg 7.63. Consistent with prior runs. 38 fixes, 55 tests, 24→10 issues, 6.4→7.63 avg score.

asi.hypothesis: Confirming run with all fixes in place — no new changes, just validating stability
asi.conclusion: Plateau reached. Remaining issues are architecture-level (extension dedup) not bugs. 58% issue reduction, 19% score improvement.

description: Batch 10: Major architectural refactor — CouncilSession shared core. Extension 350→179 lines, ask.ts 128→74 lines, zero duplication. Claude 7.5, GPT 7, Grok 8. All 3 noticed and praised the refactor. Gemini timed out (50 tool calls, 0 output).

asi.hypothesis: Extract CouncilSession class as shared orchestration core. Extension and CLI become thin wrappers.
asi.refactor_result: Extension 350→179 lines (-49%), ask.ts 128→74 lines (-42%). Zero orchestration duplication.
asi.model_feedback: Claude: found dispose() leak (fixed). Grok: praised 'clean separation, shared core'. GPT: noted unified approach.
asi.gemini_issue: 50 tool calls in 600s, never produced output. Gemini behavior, not our bug.

description: Final confirming run post-refactor. Claude 8, GPT 7, Grok 8. Avg 7.67. Claude consistently at 8 now. Journey complete: 24→7 issues, 6.4→7.67 avg, 39 fixes, 55 tests, 10 batches.

asi.hypothesis: Final confirming run with CouncilSession refactor + all fixes in place
asi.conclusion: 71% issue reduction, 20% score improvement. Claude now consistently 8/10. Ready to merge.

description: Batch 11: Config warning, real model names, --run-id flag, status exitCode, CouncilSession finishedCount fix (GPT bug), multi-waiter, SIGKILL escalation, 62 tests. Claude 8, GPT 7, Grok 8.

asi.hypothesis: Fix GPT's specific complaints: finishedCount bug, multi-waiter, SIGKILL escalation, config warning, real model names, --run-id flag
asi.gpt_fixed: finishedCount consistency after cancel/timeout, waitForCompletion multi-waiter
